fields.title: Wire thin Autoresearch adapter and app-owned runtime
fields.description: Register the tools, command, prompt hooks, lifecycle handlers, and compact status or widget UI on top of the new service and real execution boundaries. This is the pi-facing layer only.
fields.design: Add src/autoresearch/index.ts with the Ralph-style initAutoresearch(pi, runEffect) shape. Register init_experiment, run_experiment, log_experiment, and /autoresearch; translate session_start, session_switch, session_shutdown, agent_start or agent_end events into service calls; and bind compact status or widget rendering to pure service or view outputs. Add AutoresearchLive to src/app.ts. Do not implement fullscreen overlay or hotkey parity in this task.
